task: Advanced high-value task: Robust Facility Location Candidate Telemetry Evidence Reconciliation. Scenario: a specialist reviewer found conflicting signals and needs an auditable explanation of which values matter for robust facility location candidate. Embedded packet: Records: R1 capacity_units=26 demand_units=47 fixed_cost_k=7; R2 capacity_units=35 demand_units=43 fixed_cost_k=10; R3 capacity_units=21 demand_units=58 fixed_cost_k=6. Remediation options: O1 changes capacity_units by -12% cost=69500; O2 changes demand_units by -18% cost=89500; O3 changes fixed_cost_k by -25% cost=50500; max_budget=114000. Rules and constraints: unmet demand penalty applies when capacity<demand; choose minimum expected cost; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: design the output schema and acceptance checks an automated agent would need to reproduce the analysis. Deliver facility_location_2.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
